inputs.label: Cost Price
inputs.businessContext: The unit cost of the product or service.

inputs.label: Markup Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage markup applied to the cost price.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units to calculate totals for.

inputs.label: Additional Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Extra cost per unit such as shipping, packaging, or handling.

formulas.totalProfit: (costPrice + costPrice * markupPercent / 100 + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity - (costPrice + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity
formulas.profitMargin: (((costPrice + costPrice * markupPercent / 100 + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity - (costPrice + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity) / ((costPrice + costPrice * markupPercent / 100 + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity)) * 100
